translation: He frowned and turned away
notes: A study of the Verses that follow reveal the identity of ‘He’ here to be the Prophet (peace on him) himself. The use of the third person pronoun instead of the direct ‘You’ is obviously a subtle divine way to mitigate the embarrassment of a direct accusation. But, nevertheless, the accusation is there in the public domain! It shows that Allah Almighty had kept a close watch on even the minutest thing that the Prophet did, to steer him away from any wrong move on his part. It also shows up the transparency in which the Prophet truthfully conveyed the divine Message, even when it contained something disparaging to his own person.
urdu: (محمد مصطفٰےﷺ) ترش رُو ہوئے اور منہ پھیر بیٹھے

translation: That the blind man came to him.
urdu: کہ ان کے پاس ایک نابینا آیا

translation: And what do you know? He might reform [to become a righteous man].
urdu: اور تم کو کیا خبر شاید وہ پاکیزگی حاصل کرتا

translation: Or, he might deliberate, and the deliberation might benefit him.
urdu: یا سوچتا تو سمجھانا اسے فائدہ دیتا

translation: Now he who is well-to-do,
urdu: جو پروا نہیں کرتا

translation: To him you pay attention!
urdu: اس کی طرف تو تم توجہ کرتے ہو

translation: And [even when] it is not your responsibility if he would not reform!
urdu: حالانکہ اگر وہ نہ سنورے تو تم پر کچھ (الزام) نہیں

translation: And he who comes to you in earnest,
urdu: اور جو تمہارے پاس دوڑتا ہوا آیا

translation: And fears (Allah),
urdu: اور (خدا سے) ڈرتا ہے

translation: By him then are you distracted!
notes: From the narration in these ten Verses, we can surmise that the Prophet was trying to convince some rich man of the Makkan community of the necessity of Monotheism as against polytheism the man had been following. In the meantime, a blind man came and sought the Prophet’s attention on some religious matter. The Prophet felt distracted, and hence this divine admonition to him.
urdu: اس سے تم بےرخی کرتے ہو

translation: No! [Your resentment at the blind man’s intrusion is not right.] This [Qur’aan] is only an open source of divine Admonition to recite.
urdu: دیکھو یہ (قرآن) نصیحت ہے

translation: So whoso wills may recite it and take heed from
urdu: پس جو چاہے اسے یاد رکھے

translation: In records honourable,
urdu: قابل ادب ورقوں میں (لکھا ہوا)

translation: Exalted and purified,
urdu: جو بلند مقام پر رکھے ہوئے (اور) پاک ہیں

translation: By hands of scribes,
urdu: لکھنے والوں کے ہاتھوں میں

translation: Noble and virtuous!
urdu: جو سردار اور نیکو کار ہیں

translation: Man be damned, how ungrateful is he!
urdu: انسان ہلاک ہو جائے کیسا ناشکرا ہے

translation: Out of what thing did He create him?
urdu: اُسے (خدا نے) کس چیز سے بنایا؟

translation: HE created him out of fertilized ovum and then moulded him in due proportion.
urdu: نطفے سے بنایا پھر اس کا اندازہ مقرر کیا

translation: And then made the path of life convenient for him.
urdu: پھر اس کے لیے رستہ آسان کر دیا

translation: And then He caused him to die and consigned him to dust.
urdu: پھر اس کو موت دی پھر قبر میں دفن کرایا

translation: And then, whenever He wishes, He will raise him back to life.
urdu: پھر جب چاہے گا اسے اٹھا کھڑا کرے گا

translation: No! Man did certainly not carry out what Allah had asked him to do.
urdu: کچھ شک نہیں کہ خدا نے اسے جو حکم دیا اس نے اس پر عمل نہ کیا

translation: Let man just look at his food.
urdu: تو انسان کو چاہیئے کہ اپنے کھانے کی طرف نظر کرے

translation: [To enable man to get his food] We poured water [rain] in showers,
urdu: بے شک ہم ہی نے پانی برسایا

translation: And We pierced the soil, so that it got soaked [with rain water].
urdu: پھر ہم ہی نے زمین کو چیرا پھاڑا

translation: Then We caused grain to grow therein,
urdu: پھر ہم ہی نے اس میں اناج اگایا

translation: And grapevines and vegetables,
urdu: اور انگور اور ترکاری

translation: And olive-trees and palm-trees,
urdu: اور زیتون اور کھجوریں

translation: And luxuriant orchards,
urdu: اور گھنے گھنے باغ

translation: And fruits and fodder
urdu: اور میوے اور چارا

translation: As provision for you and your cattle.
urdu: (یہ سب کچھ) تمہارے اور تمہارے چارپایوں کے لیے بنایا

translation: Then as the deafening blast occurs
urdu: تو جب (قیامت کا) غل مچے گا

translation: On the Day when every man would flee from his brother,
urdu: اس دن آدمی اپنے بھائی سے دور بھاگے گا

translation: And his mother and his father;
urdu: اور اپنی ماں اور اپنے باپ سے

translation: And his spouse and his children.
urdu: اور اپنی بیوی اور اپنے بیٹے سے

arabic: لِكُلِّ ٱمۡرِيٕٖ مِّنۡهُمۡ يَوۡمَئِذٖ شَأۡنٞ يُغۡنِيهِ
transliteration: Likulli imriin minhum yawmaithin shanun yughneehi
translation: On that Day everyone among them will be preoccupied with his own individual concerns.
urdu: ہر شخص اس روز ایک فکر میں ہو گا جو اسے (مصروفیت کے لیے) بس کرے گا

translation: Faces that Day would be beaming,
urdu: اور کتنے منہ اس روز چمک رہے ہوں گے

translation: Cheerful and joyous.
urdu: خنداں و شاداں (یہ مومنان نیکو کار ہیں)

translation: And faces that Day would be gloomy,
urdu: اور کتنے منہ ہوں گے جن پر گرد پڑ رہی ہو گی

translation: Darkness covering them.
urdu: (اور) سیاہی چڑھ رہی ہو گی

translation: Those would be the ones suppressing the Truth, the ones wicked!
urdu: یہ کفار بدکردار ہیں
